Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more AI tools.

## [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]: Unlimited Music Creation

[[link:/tools/200|Suno]] can generate original background music in any style.

### Suno for Background Music

- **Custom length**: Perfect for your content
- **Royalty-free**: Use in any project

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai
